meta.description: CLI-Hub — Agent-native stateful CLI interfaces for softwares, codebases, and Web Services

clis.name: anygen
clis.description: Generate docs, slides, websites and more via AnyGen cloud API

commands.name: task_download
commands.description: Download the generated file for a completed task.

commands.name: task_thumbnail
commands.description: Download thumbnail image for a completed task.

commands.name: task_prepare
commands.description: Multi-turn requirement analysis before creating a task.

commands.name: file_upload
commands.description: Upload a reference file to get a file_token.

commands.name: config_get
commands.description: Get a configuration value (or show all).

clis.name: adguardhome
clis.description: DNS ad-blocking and network infrastructure management via AdGuardHome REST API

clis.name: audacity
clis.description: Audio editing and processing via sox

commands.name: track_set
commands.description: Set a track property (name, mute, solo, volume, pan).

commands.name: clip_add
commands.description: Add an audio clip to a track.

commands.name: clip_remove
commands.description: Remove a clip from a track.

commands.name: clip_trim
commands.description: Trim a clip's start and/or end.

commands.name: clip_split
commands.description: Split a clip at a given time position.

commands.name: clip_move
commands.description: Move a clip to a new start time.

commands.name: effect_add
commands.description: Add an effect to a track.

commands.name: label_add
commands.description: Add a label at a time position.

commands.name: media_check
commands.description: Check that all referenced audio files exist.

commands.name: export_render
commands.description: Render the project to an audio file.

clis.name: blender
clis.description: 3D modeling, animation, and rendering via blender --background --python

commands.name: object_set
commands.description: Set an object property (name, visible, location, rotation, scale, parent).

commands.name: object_get
commands.description: Get detailed info about an object.

commands.name: material_assign
commands.description: Assign a material to an object.

commands.name: material_set
commands.description: Set a material property (color, metallic, roughness, specular, alpha, etc.).

commands.name: material_get
commands.description: Get detailed info about a material.

commands.name: modifier_add
commands.description: Add a modifier to an object.

commands.name: camera_orbit
commands.description: Orbit camera around a center point.

commands.name: camera_pan
commands.description: Pan camera from one look-at target to another.

commands.name: camera_shake
commands.description: Add procedural camera shake with exponential decay.

commands.name: shape_morph
commands.description: Animate shape-key morph between two objects.

commands.name: particles_emit_object
commands.description: Add a particle system to an existing object.

commands.name: particles_emit_point
commands.description: Create an emitter at a world position.

commands.name: particles_emit_text
commands.description: Convert a text object to mesh and add particles.

commands.name: compositor_color_grade
commands.description: Add color grading (Color Balance + Hue Saturation).

commands.name: light_add
commands.description: Add a light to the scene.

commands.name: animation_remove_keyframe
commands.description: Remove a keyframe from an object.

commands.name: render_color_management
commands.description: Configure scene color management (view transform + look).

commands.name: text3d_explode
commands.description: Create individual text objects per character.

commands.name: text3d_bounce
commands.description: Animate per-character drop with bounce easing.

commands.name: text3d_extrude_in
commands.description: Animate per-character extrusion depth from flat to 3D.

commands.name: expression_wiggle
commands.description: Bake wiggle noise to per-frame keyframes.

commands.name: expression_procedural
commands.description: Bake a procedural loop expression to per-frame keyframes.

clis.name: comfyui
clis.description: AI image generation workflow management via ComfyUI REST API

clis.name: drawio
clis.description: Diagram creation and export via draw.io CLI

commands.name: project_xml
commands.description: Print the raw XML of the current project.

commands.name: shape_add
commands.description: Add a shape to the diagram. SHAPE_TYPE: rectangle, rounded, ellipse, diamond, triangle, hexagon, cylinder, cloud, parallelogram, process, document, callout, note, actor, text

commands.name: shape_list
commands.description: List all shapes on a page.

commands.name: shape_move
commands.description: Move a shape to new coordinates.

commands.name: shape_style
commands.description: Set a style property on a shape. Common keys: fillColor, strokeColor, fontColor, fontSize, opacity, rounded, shadow, dashed, strokeWidth

commands.name: shape_info
commands.description: Show detailed info about a shape.

commands.name: connect_style
commands.description: Set a style property on a connector.

commands.name: connect_list
commands.description: List all connectors on a page.

clis.name: gimp
clis.description: Raster image processing via gimp -i -b (batch mode)

commands.name: layer_add_from_file
commands.description: Add a layer from an image file.

commands.name: layer_move
commands.description: Move a layer to a new position.

commands.name: layer_set
commands.description: Set a layer property (name, opacity, visible, mode, offset_x, offset_y).

commands.name: layer_merge_down
commands.description: Merge a layer with the one below it.

commands.name: canvas_crop
commands.description: Crop the canvas to a rectangle.

commands.name: filter_add
commands.description: Add a filter to a layer.

commands.name: media_list
commands.description: List media files referenced in the project.

commands.name: media_check
commands.description: Check that all referenced media files exist.

commands.name: media_histogram
commands.description: Show histogram analysis of an image.

commands.name: export_render
commands.description: Render the project to an image file.

commands.name: draw_text
commands.description: Draw text on a layer (by converting it to a text layer).

commands.name: draw_rect
commands.description: Draw a rectangle (stored as drawing operation).

commands.name: animation_sequence
commands.description: Generate a frame sequence to a directory.

clis.name: inkscape
clis.description: SVG vector graphics with export via inkscape --export-filename

commands.name: shape_get
commands.description: Get detailed info about a shape.

commands.name: text_set
commands.description: Set a text property (text, font-family, font-size, fill, etc.).

commands.name: style_set_fill
commands.description: Set the fill color of an object.

commands.name: style_set_stroke
commands.description: Set the stroke color (and optionally width) of an object.

commands.name: style_set_opacity
commands.description: Set the opacity of an object (0.0-1.0).

commands.name: style_set
commands.description: Set an arbitrary style property on an object.

commands.name: style_get
commands.description: Get the style properties of an object.

commands.name: transform_get
commands.description: Get the current transform of an object.

commands.name: transform_clear
commands.description: Clear all transforms from an object.

commands.name: layer_move_object
commands.description: Move an object to a different layer.

commands.name: layer_set
commands.description: Set a layer property (name, visible, locked, opacity).

commands.name: layer_reorder
commands.description: Move a layer from one position to another.

commands.name: layer_get
commands.description: Get detailed info about a layer.

commands.name: path_difference
commands.description: Difference of two objects (A minus B).

commands.name: path_convert
commands.description: Convert a shape to a path.

commands.name: gradient_apply
commands.description: Apply a gradient to an object.

commands.name: export_pdf
commands.description: Export the document as PDF (requires Inkscape).

clis.name: kdenlive
clis.description: Video editing and rendering via melt

commands.name: bin_remove
commands.description: Remove a clip from the bin.

commands.name: bin_list
commands.description: List all clips in the bin.

commands.name: timeline_add_track
commands.description: Add a track to the timeline.

commands.name: timeline_add_clip
commands.description: Add a clip to a track.

commands.name: timeline_remove_clip
commands.description: Remove a clip from a track.

commands.name: timeline_split
commands.description: Split a clip at a time offset.

commands.name: timeline_move
commands.description: Move a clip to a new position.

commands.name: filter_add
commands.description: Add a filter to a clip.

commands.name: filter_remove
commands.description: Remove a filter from a clip.

commands.name: keyframe_remove
commands.description: Remove a keyframe at a specific time.

commands.name: keyframe_clear
commands.description: Clear all keyframes from a parameter.

clis.name: libreoffice
clis.description: Create and manipulate ODF documents, export to PDF/DOCX/XLSX/PPTX via headless mode

commands.name: writer_add_heading
commands.description: Add a heading to the document.

commands.name: writer_add_table
commands.description: Add a table to the document.

commands.name: writer_remove
commands.description: Remove a content item by index.

commands.name: writer_set_text
commands.description: Set the text of a content item.

commands.name: impress_add_slide
commands.description: Add a slide to the presentation.

commands.name: impress_set_content
commands.description: Update a slide's title and/or content.

commands.name: impress_add_element
commands.description: Add an element to a slide.

commands.name: style_apply
commands.description: Apply a style to a content item (Writer only).

commands.name: export_render
commands.description: Export the document to a file.

clis.name: mubu
clis.description: Knowledge management and outlining via local Mubu desktop data

commands.name: discover_docs
commands.description: List latest known document snapshots from local backups.

commands.name: discover_folders
commands.description: List folder metadata from local RxDB storage.

commands.name: discover_folder_docs
commands.description: List document metadata for one folder.

commands.name: discover_path_docs
commands.description: List documents for one folder path or folder id.

commands.name: discover_recent
commands.description: List recently active documents using backups, metadata, and sync logs.

commands.name: discover_daily
commands.description: Find Daily-style folders and list the documents inside them.

commands.name: discover_daily_current
commands.description: Resolve the current daily document from one Daily-style folder.

commands.name: inspect_show
commands.description: Show the latest backup tree for one document.

commands.name: inspect_search
commands.description: Search latest backups for matching node text or note content.

commands.name: inspect_changes
commands.description: Parse recent client-sync change events from local logs.

commands.name: inspect_links
commands.description: Extract outbound Mubu document links from one document backup.

commands.name: inspect_open_path
commands.description: Open one document by full path, suffix path, title, or doc id.

commands.name: inspect_doc_nodes
commands.description: List live document nodes with node ids and update-target paths.

commands.name: inspect_daily_nodes
commands.description: List live nodes from the current daily document in one step.

commands.name: mutate_create_child
commands.description: Build or execute one child-node creation against the live Mubu API.

commands.name: mutate_delete_node
commands.description: Build or execute one node deletion against the live Mubu API.

commands.name: mutate_update_text
commands.description: Build or execute one text update against the live Mubu API.

commands.name: session_state_path
commands.description: Show the session state file path.

commands.name: session_use_daily
commands.description: Resolve and persist the current daily document reference.

commands.name: session_history
commands.description: Show recent command history stored in session state.

clis.name: mermaid
clis.description: Mermaid Live Editor state files and renderer URLs

clis.name: notebooklm
clis.description: Experimental NotebookLM harness scaffold wrapping the installed notebooklm CLI for notebook, source, chat, artifact, download, and sharing workflows
clis.requires: notebooklm CLI from notebooklm-py + valid local NotebookLM login session

commands.name: chat_ask
commands.description: Ask a question against a notebook.

clis.name: ollama
clis.description: Local LLM inference and model management via Ollama REST API

commands.name: model_pull
commands.description: Download a model from the Ollama library.

commands.name: model_rm
commands.description: Delete a model from local storage.

commands.name: model_copy
commands.description: Copy a model to a new name.

commands.name: model_ps
commands.description: List models currently loaded in memory.

commands.name: server_status
commands.description: Check if Ollama server is running.

commands.name: session_history
commands.description: Show chat history for current session.

clis.name: obs-studio
clis.description: Create and manage streaming/recording scenes via command line

commands.name: project_new
commands.description: Create a new OBS scene collection.

commands.name: source_add
commands.description: Add a source to a scene.

commands.name: source_set
commands.description: Set a source property (name, visible, locked, opacity, rotation).

commands.name: source_transform
commands.description: Transform a source (position, size, crop, rotation).

commands.name: source_list
commands.description: List all sources in a scene.

commands.name: filter_add
commands.description: Add a filter to a source.

commands.name: filter_remove
commands.description: Remove a filter from a source.

commands.name: filter_list
commands.description: List all filters on a source.

commands.name: audio_volume
commands.description: Set volume for an audio source (0.0-3.0).

clis.name: shotcut
clis.description: Video editing and rendering via melt/ffmpeg
clis.requires: melt (apt install melt), ffmpeg (apt install ffmpeg)

commands.name: project_save
commands.description: Save the current project. Optionally specify a new path.

commands.name: project_xml
commands.description: Print the raw MLT XML of the current project.

commands.name: timeline_add_clip
commands.description: Add a media clip to a track.

commands.name: timeline_remove_clip
commands.description: Remove a clip from a track.

commands.name: timeline_move_clip
commands.description: Move a clip between tracks or positions.

commands.name: timeline_split
commands.description: Split a clip into two at the given timecode.

commands.name: timeline_clips
commands.description: List all clips on a track.

commands.name: timeline_add_blank
commands.description: Add a blank gap to a track.

commands.name: timeline_hide
commands.description: Hide or unhide a video track.

commands.name: filter_info
commands.description: Show detailed info about a filter and its parameters.

commands.name: filter_set
commands.description: Set a parameter on a filter.

commands.name: keyframe_remove
commands.description: Remove a keyframe at a specific time.

commands.name: keyframe_list
commands.description: List keyframes for a filter parameter.

commands.name: keyframe_clear
commands.description: Clear all keyframes from a parameter.

commands.name: media_list
commands.description: List all media clips in the current project.

commands.name: media_check
commands.description: Check all media files for existence.

commands.name: export_preset_info
commands.description: Show details of an export preset.

commands.name: export_render
commands.description: Render the project to a video file.

commands.name: transition_info
commands.description: Show detailed info about a transition type.

commands.name: transition_set
commands.description: Set a parameter on a transition.

commands.name: transition_list
commands.description: List all transitions on the timeline.

commands.name: composite_set_blend
commands.description: Set the blend mode for a track.

commands.name: composite_get_blend
commands.description: Get the current blend mode for a track.

commands.name: composite_set_opacity
commands.description: Set the opacity of a track (0.0-1.0).

commands.name: composite_pip
commands.description: Set picture-in-picture position for a clip.

commands.name: sync_list
commands.description: List all imported sync markers on the timeline.

commands.name: title_add
commands.description: Add a text title to a clip.

commands.name: title_animate
commands.description: Apply a preset animation to a title filter.

commands.name: mask_add
commands.description: Add a mask to a clip or track.

commands.name: mask_animate
commands.description: Animate a mask parameter with keyframes.

commands.name: mask_track_matte
commands.description: Add a track matte transition between two tracks.

clis.name: zoom
clis.description: Meeting management via Zoom REST API (OAuth2)

commands.name: meeting_join
commands.description: Open meeting join URL in browser.

commands.name: meeting_start
commands.description: Open meeting start URL in browser (host only).

commands.name: participant_add
commands.description: Register a participant for a meeting.

commands.name: participant_add_batch
commands.description: Batch register participants from a CSV file. CSV format: email,first_name,last_name (header row required)

commands.name: participant_attended
commands.description: List participants who attended a past meeting. Requires the meeting UUID (not the numeric ID).

commands.name: recording_files
commands.description: List recording files for a specific meeting.

commands.name: recording_download
commands.description: Download a recording file. DOWNLOAD_URL: The download URL from 'recording files' output. OUTPUT_PATH: Local file path to save the recording.

commands.name: recording_delete
commands.description: Delete all recordings for a meeting.

clis.name: claude-code
clis.description: Programmatic control of Claude Code AI sessions via CLI

commands.name: session_delete
commands.description: Delete a session (resets local state if it matches).

commands.name: tool_call
commands.description: Call a tool by name with JSON args.

commands.name: mcp_add
commands.description: Add MCP server. Usage: mcp add NAME COMMAND [ARGS...]
